PyCon 2025

The Premier Annual Python Conference

Bringing together developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts for talks, workshops, and networking.

Register Now

About PyCon 2025

PyCon 2025 is the premier annual conference for the Python community. Whether you're a seasoned developer, a data scientist exploring new frontiers, or an enthusiast eager to learn, PyCon brings together the brightest minds in the Python ecosystem.

Our conference features world-class talks from industry leaders, hands-on workshops covering cutting-edge topics, and unparalleled networking opportunities with fellow Python enthusiasts from around the globe.

Expert Talks

Learn from industry leaders and core Python developers sharing insights on the latest trends, best practices, and innovations in the Python ecosystem.

Hands-On Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering topics from web development and data science to machine learning and DevOps.

Networking

Connect with thousands of Python developers, data scientists, and enthusiasts. Build relationships that can shape your career.

Schedule

PyCon 2025 runs for three days packed with keynotes, talks, workshops, and social events.

Day 1: Keynotes & Opening

Date: May 16, 2025

Join us for opening remarks and inspiring keynote presentations from Python community leaders. Meet fellow attendees at the welcome reception.

Day 2: Talks & Workshops

Date: May 17, 2025

Dive deep into parallel tracks of technical talks and hands-on workshops. Choose from topics spanning web development, data science, DevOps, and more.

Day 3: Advanced Topics & Closing

Date: May 18, 2025

Explore advanced topics, attend lightning talks, and join us for the closing ceremony and networking dinner.

Venue

PyCon 2025 will be held at the Convention Center in Portland, Oregon, a world-class venue with state-of-the-art facilities designed to host our growing community.

Location

Portland Convention Center

777 NE Martin Luther King Jr. Blvd
Portland, OR 97232
United States

Accessibility

The venue is fully accessible with wheelchair access, accessible restrooms, and accommodations for attendees with disabilities. ASL interpretation and live captioning will be provided.

Getting There

Conveniently located near public transportation. Free parking available for registered attendees. Shuttle service from major hotels.

Register

Secure your spot at PyCon 2025 today! Early bird tickets are available at a special rate until April 30, 2025.

Early Bird

$199

Available until April 30, 2025

Includes all three days of talks, workshops, meals, and networking events.

Regular

$299

Available May 1 - May 15, 2025

Includes all three days of talks, workshops, meals, and networking events.

Student

$99

Valid student ID required

Includes all three days of talks, workshops, meals, and networking events.
